title: Dividos
solution_description: Next-generation data and AI platform enabling organizations to maintain full control over their data while accessing advanced analytics, business intelligence, and artificial intelligence capabilities.
description: Dividos is a next-generation analytics and AI platform enabling organizations to maintain full control over their data while accessing advanced analytics, business intelligence, data warehousing, and artificial intelligence capabilities.
target_description: Organizations requiring data sovereignty and advanced analytics capabilities: financial institutions navigating data localization requirements, multinational corporations seeking regional data residency, government agencies requiring secure local hosting for sensitive information, telecommunications companies managing massive data volumes, energy sector operators needing high-performance analytics, and any enterprise seeking to escape hyperscaler cloud costs and vendor lock-in while maintaining world-class analytics capability.

target_audience.text: Financial institutions with data localization needs
Government agencies requiring secure local hosting

capabilities_subtitle: Comprehensive platform capabilities designed to deliver data sovereignty without compromising functionality.

capabilities.title: Data Sovereignty and Local Hosting
capabilities.description: Full control over data location and infrastructure. Host in regional datacenters, national facilities, or private infrastructure ensuring compliance with data residency requirements and regulatory frameworks.

capabilities.title: Advanced Analytics and Business Intelligence
capabilities.description: Comprehensive analytics capabilities including interactive dashboards, ad-hoc analysis, predictive modeling, and real-time operational intelligence.

capabilities.title: Data Warehousing and Integration
capabilities.description: Scalable data warehousing supporting massive data volumes with consistent performance. Integrate data from disparate sources creating unified foundation for analytics and AI.

capabilities.title: Artificial Intelligence and GenAI
capabilities.description: Deploy machine learning models, natural language processing, and generative AI capabilities while maintaining data sovereignty on locally-hosted infrastructure.

capabilities.title: High Availability Architecture
capabilities.description: Twin datacenter setup ensuring business continuity and disaster recovery. Scalability across compute, storage, memory, and user capacity supporting organizational growth.

capabilities.title: Open Architecture
capabilities.description: Modular, vendor-agnostic platform eliminating lock-in. Choose tools and technologies best supporting your strategy rather than being constrained by proprietary ecosystems.

capabilities.title: Transparent Pricing
capabilities.description: Pay-as-you-go model with no hidden costs or long-term commitments. Predictable pricing enabling accurate budget planning and cost control.

capabilities.title: Multi-Tenant Capabilities
capabilities.description: Support multiple business units, subsidiaries, or clients on shared infrastructure while maintaining data isolation, security, and governance.

outcomes_subtitle: Organizations deploying Dividos report significant cost reductions, improved performance, enhanced security, and strategic flexibility through vendor independence.

outcomes.label: Data Sovereignty
outcomes.description: Complete control over data location and security

cta_title: Explore Data Sovereignty for Your Organization
cta_description: Contact Bravinci to discuss how Dividos can address your data sovereignty, analytics, and cloud cost challenges.

title: Strategy Command Center
description: Strategic Command Center is a comprehensive strategic planning and monitoring platform that integrates internal performance metrics, strategy development tools, and competitive intelligence into one unified environment. Powered by 40 years of strategic expertise and enhanced with AI, this system includes a sophisticated data warehouse seamlessly connecting HR analytics, financial data, operational KPIs, strategic intelligence radar, OKR tracking, roadmap management, threat and opportunity analysis, competitive positioning, and battle cards.
target_description: C-suite executives, strategy officers, and board members requiring comprehensive strategic oversight in one integrated platform. Ideal for organizations navigating volatile markets, competitive pressure, and complex transformation initiatives where strategic foresight, performance monitoring, and competitive intelligence must converge seamlessly. Particularly valuable for leadership teams managing strategic portfolios across business units, geographies, or market segments requiring unified situational awareness.
capabilities_subtitle: Comprehensive strategic intelligence across performance, strategy development, and competitive analysis zones.

capabilities.title: HR System Integration
capabilities.description: Workforce analytics, diversity metrics, recruitment performance, and transformation insights via AI Virtual Consultant.

capabilities.title: Financial Data Dashboard
capabilities.description: Key financial metrics with customizable KPI tracking for comprehensive financial oversight.

capabilities.title: Operational and Commercial KPIs
capabilities.description: Tailored to organizational requirements with direct system connectivity for real-time monitoring.

capabilities.title: Strategic Intelligence Radar
capabilities.description: Monitoring market trends, black swans, grey swans, and grey rhinos based on continuous intelligence programs.

capabilities.title: OKR Tracking
capabilities.description: Objectives and Key Results tracking displaying past, present, and future performance with intervention monitoring.

capabilities.title: Strategic Roadmap Portfolio
capabilities.description: Portfolio management supporting both agile and waterfall methodologies for comprehensive planning.

capabilities.title: Threat and Opportunity Radar
capabilities.description: Visualizing competitive landscape based on ongoing research and analysis for proactive positioning.

capabilities.title: Competitive Sweet Spot
capabilities.description: Positioning showing organizational position relative to competitors and client needs.

capabilities.title: Battle Cards
capabilities.description: Competitor pricing, sales tactics, strengths, weaknesses, USPs, and winning strategies at your fingertips.

outcomes_subtitle: Organizations implementing Strategic Command Center achieve unified strategic visibility, faster decision cycles, and proactive identification of threats and opportunities.

outcomes.label: Strategic Visibility
outcomes.description: Eliminating fragmented reporting across the organization

outcomes.label: Strategic Decision Cycles
outcomes.description: Through integrated intelligence and real-time insights

cta_description: Transform strategy from periodic planning exercises into continuous intelligence capability.

capability_zones.title: Performance Zone (Left Console)
capability_zones.subtitle: Real-time visibility into organizational performance across HR, financial, and operational dimensions.

capability_zones.title: Strategy Development Zone (Center Console)
capability_zones.subtitle: Comprehensive tools for strategic planning, monitoring, and adaptation in dynamic markets.

capability_zones.title: Competitive Analysis Zone (Right Console)
capability_zones.subtitle: Deep competitive intelligence enabling proactive positioning and strategic response.

title: Data2Hire
solution_description: AI-powered talent intelligence platform that integrates HRIS, ATS, and external data sources to provide real-time workforce insights and optimize talent acquisition.
description: Data2Hire integrates data from HRIS, ATS, and external sources into a comprehensive dataset. The platform's interactive dashboard provides real-time insights into workforce trends and risk scores, allowing HR teams to monitor and adjust strategies effectively.
target_description: Organisations facing critical skills gaps, high-growth companies are scaling rapidly, and enterprises are seeking specialised technical or sector expertise. Particularly valuable for technology companies, professional services firms, and organisations undergoing digital transformation requiring new capability development.
capabilities_subtitle: Comprehensive talent intelligence capabilities that transform how you identify, assess, and retain top talent.

capabilities.title: AI-powered Candidate Matching and Ranking
capabilities.description: Intelligent algorithms that match candidates to positions based on skills, experience, and organizational needs.

capabilities.title: Skills Assessment and Gap Analysis
capabilities.description: Comprehensive evaluation of candidate capabilities and identification of skill gaps for targeted development.

capabilities.title: Cultural Fit Evaluation and Prediction
capabilities.description: Advanced assessment tools that predict how well candidates will align with organizational culture and values.

capabilities.title: Performance Forecasting and Success Modelling
capabilities.description: Predictive analytics that forecast candidate performance and success probability in specific roles.

capabilities.title: Global Talent Market Intelligence
capabilities.description: Real-time insights into global talent markets, availability, and competitive compensation benchmarks.

capabilities.title: Hiring Velocity Optimization
capabilities.description: Streamlined processes and automation that accelerate time-to-hire while maintaining quality standards.

capabilities.title: Retention Risk Assessment
capabilities.description: Early warning systems that identify retention risks and enable proactive intervention strategies.

capabilities.title: Workforce Planning and Succession Modelling
capabilities.description: Strategic workforce planning tools that support succession planning and organizational capability development.

outcomes_subtitle: Organizations using Data2Hire achieve better talent decisions, reduced recruitment costs, and accelerated organizational capability development.

outcomes.label: Reduction in Time-to-Hire
outcomes.description: Accelerated recruitment processes without compromising quality

outcomes.label: Improvement in First-Year Retention
outcomes.description: Better talent decisions leading to longer tenure

outcomes.label: Hiring Manager Satisfaction
outcomes.description: Significantly improved satisfaction with talent acquisition

cta_description: See how Data2Hire can transform your talent acquisition and workforce planning strategies.
